message:
fix: rustfmt scheduler test, update windows signal constant, sync beads

- scheduler_wakeup_correctness.rs: rustfmt long type annotation for
  Arc<Mutex<Option<PreemptionMetrics>>> and extract dispatch_time lock
  guard into separate binding to avoid holding lock across assertion
- windows_platform_completeness.rs: update expected signal constant from
  libc::SIGBREAK to signal_hook::consts::SIGBREAK to match source change
- .beads/issues.jsonl: sync bead tracker state

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
